title: Minimum Wages and Conditions of Employment, 1982
citation: Minimum Wages and Conditions of Employment, 1982

sections.heading: 1. Short title
sections.text: This Act may be cited as the Minimum Wages and Conditions of Employment Act.

sections.heading: 2. Interpretation
sections.text: In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires-"protected worker" means a worker to whom a statutory order made under this Act applies;"Labour Commissioner" means the person appointed as such under section four of the Employment Act;[Cap. 268]"labour officer" shall have the meaning ascribed thereto in section three of the Employment Act;[Cap. 268]"wage" includes remuneration of any kind.

sections.heading: 3. Regulation of wages, etc.
sections.text: rates of wages to be paid to workers by the hour, day, week or month;

sections.heading: 5. Functions ofLabour Commissionerand labour officers
sections.text: order the production, for examination, of any record required to be compiled and maintained under section four, and make copies thereof or take extracts therefrom;

sections.heading: 6. Recovery of wages
sections.text: any sum is due from an employer to aprotected workerby reason of the failure of the employer to comply with any statutory order made under this Act; and

sections.heading: 7. Exemption permits
sections.text: If theLabour Commissioneris satisfied that aprotected worker, or a person desiring to become aprotected worker, is affected by any infirmity or physical disablement, he may, subject to such conditions as he thinks fit, issue to such person an exemption permit.

sections.heading: 8. Void agreements
sections.text: Any agreement which contravenes any of the provisions of this Act, or any statutory order or regulation made hereunder, shall be void to the extent of such contravention.

sections.heading: 9. Regulations
sections.text: The Minister may, by statutory instrument, make regulations prescribing any matter which is necessary for the better carrying out of the provisions of this Act.

sections.heading: 10. Repeal and savings
sections.text: The Minimum Wages, Wages Councils and Conditions of Employment Act is hereby repealed.
